## Checklist

- [ ] `./.bin/argsh test tests/unit/ tests/operator/` passes
- [ ] Lint clean (`npm run lint` / `./.bin/argsh lint`) — no new shellcheck warnings
- [ ] Conventional-commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, …)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, flags, or schema changed
- [ ] No secrets committed; no remote scripts piped into a shell
